input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.6.3
            TITLE: each parallel element of multiple parallel battery cells, capacitors, strings of battery cells,

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.6.3: Each parallel element of multiple parallel battery cells, capacitors, strings of battery cells,
EV.6.6.3 Each parallel element of multiple parallel battery cells, capacitors, strings of battery cells, 
strings of capacitors, or conductors must have individual Overcurrent Protection.

final_answer: Each parallel element of multiple parallel battery cells, capacitors, strings of battery cells, strings of capacitors, or conductors must have individual Overcurrent Protection.
